ai.desc: AI 参数对象。支持 ai.extract.*

steps.desc: 规范化 ai.extract 输入参数

action.code:
function(input){ function asText(v){ return String(v == null ? '' : v).trim(); } function asArr(v){ if(!Array.isArray(v)) return []; const out=[]; const seen=new Set(); for(const x of v){ const s=asText(x); if(!s || seen.has(s)) continue; seen.add(s); out.push(s); } return out; } function asObj(v){ return (v && typeof v==='object' && !Array.isArray(v)) ? v : {}; } const root=asObj(input); const ai=asObj(root.ai); const aiExtract=asObj(ai.extract); const ex=asObj(root.extract); const dotExtract = asObj(root['ai.extract']); const merged={ ...ex, ...dotExtract, ...aiExtract }; const goal=asText(merged.goal || root.goal || merged.query || root.query || '提取当前页面所需结构化信息'); const fields=asArr(merged.fields || root.fields); const requireFields=asArr(merged.requireFields || root.requireFields); const model=asText(merged.model || root.model || 'balanced'); const output=asText(merged.output || root.output || 'json').toLowerCase(); const schemaRaw = asObj(merged.schema || root.schema); let schema = schemaRaw; if(!Object.keys(schema).length && (fields.length || requireFields.length)){ const props={}; const all = fields.length ? fields : requireFields; for(const f of all){ props[f] = { type: 'string' }; } schema = { type: 'object', properties: props, required: requireFields, additionalProperties: true }; } if(!Object.keys(schema).length){ schema = { type: 'object', additionalProperties: true }; } const promptRaw=asText(merged.prompt || root.prompt); const prompt = promptRaw || ( '你是网页结构化抽取器。请严格按给定 schema 返回 JSON 对象。' + '
目标：' + goal + '
字段偏好：' + (fields.length ? fields.join(', ') : '(未指定)') + '
必填字段：' + (requireFields.length ? requireFields.join(', ') : '(无)') + '
要求：不要输出解释文本，不要输出 markdown，只返回 JSON 对象。' ); return { goal, fields, requireFields, model, output, schema, prompt }; }
args: ${{ ({ ai: args.ai || {}, extract: args.extract || {}, goal: args.goal, fields: args.fields, requireFields: args.requireFields, schema: args.schema, prompt: args.prompt, model: args.model, output: args.output }) }}

steps.desc: 调用 run_ai 基于清洗页面内容做结构化抽取

action.input: ${{ ({ goal: vars.extractCtx.goal, fields: vars.extractCtx.fields, requireFields: vars.extractCtx.requireFields, output: vars.extractCtx.output }) }}

steps.desc: 归一化输出并校验 requireFields

action.code:
function(aiOut, ctx){ function asText(v){ return String(v == null ? '' : v).trim(); } function asObj(v){ return (v && typeof v === 'object' && !Array.isArray(v)) ? v : {}; } function toText(v){ return String(v==null?'':v).replace(/!\[[^\]]*\]\([^\)]*\)/g,'').replace(/\[([^\]]+)\]\([^\)]*\)/g,'$1').replace(//g,'').replace(/[ 	]+
/g,'
').replace(/
{3,}/g,'

').trim(); } const data = asObj(aiOut); const c = asObj(ctx); const req = Array.isArray(c.requireFields) ? c.requireFields : []; const outMode = asText(c.output || 'json').toLowerCase(); if(outMode === 'text'){ for(const k of Object.keys(data)){ if(typeof data[k] === 'string'){ data[k] = toText(data[k]); } } } const missingFields = req.filter((k)=>{ const v = data[k]; return v == null || asText(v) === ''; }); return { action:'extract', data, missingFields, meta:{ goal: asText(c.goal), model: asText(c.model), output: outMode, fieldCount: Object.keys(data).length } }; }

extractCtx.desc: 规范化后的抽取上下文

extractOut.desc: 归一化后的 ai.extract 结果
